title: Bothan Border
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Bothan Border''' was the edge of [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan Space]]. It was near [[Planet/Legends|planets]] such as [[Dinlo]].

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' indicates that the planet Dinlo is near the Bothan Border. However, more recent sources such as the ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' place Dinlo much closer to the Core. The Bothan Border does not appear in any other sources.

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]''
